name: a2a-event-x
description: Standalone B/S Session Hub + A2A Event Log (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Grok Build, Antigravity)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/session-hub && npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/webapp && npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/cli && npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/mcp-server
scripts.web: npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/session-hub && npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/webapp && npm run start -w @a2a-event-x/webapp
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/session-hub && tsc -p packages/webapp && tsc -p packages/cli
